detail.description:
🔩 Unscrewing puzzles? 🔑 Hunting for keys? We’ve got it all!
🧩 Tired of just clearing levels? 🏙️ How about rebuilding an entire CITY? 
Get ready for a puzzle game with a bigger purpose! ✨

In Woodle Screw™ Pin Nuts & Bolts, your puzzle-solving skills get a major upgrade. It’s the addictive screw puzzle you love, but now every victory directly contributes to rebuilding a magnificent city, turning your wins into visible, satisfying progress.

This adds a whole new dimension to the game. You'll
detail.recentChanges:
What's New:
- You can get various coin bundles and prop bundles in the shop.
- Added Mine Rush and Ticket Challenge Event.
- Improved UI for a better gaming experience.
- Bug fixes and performance improvements.

We hope you enjoy the update!
Please leave us a review if you like the game.
Thank you for playing Woodle Screw™ Pin Nuts & Bolts :)
